chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Suit No. 838 of 2002 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES For final arguments 22-10-2024 None present for the plaintiff. Mr. Asim Iqbal, Advocate for defendant. ============= On 15.05.2018, an advocate had appeared in Court on behalf of the Plaintiff and undertaken to file his vakalatnama. The case was next fixed in Court on 09.08.2018, when the Plaintiff’s counsel made a representation that the Plaintiff had expired. Time was sought by him to verify his information and file an amended title. The case came up for hearing on 09.12.2019, 28.01.2020, 27.02.2020, 06.09.2023, however the counsel for the Plaintiff did not turn up. Direct notices were also issued to the Plaintiff, who too did not turn up. Even today nobody is present, and no intimation has been received. It seems that the Plaintiff and his counsel have both lost interest in these proceedings but have not had the courtesy to inform the Court of the same. Suit is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE
